description: Event-sourced ticket system with a Jira reconciler, exposed as an MCP server.
name: io.github.navapbc/rebar

environmentVariables.description: Path to the repo root that holds the .tickets-tracker store (defaults to the git toplevel of the working dir).
environmentVariables.name: REBAR_ROOT

environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to expose only the read tools (no write/mutation tools).
environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_READONLY

environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to allow the live (mutating) Jira reconcile mode; otherwise reconcile is dry-run only.
environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE
